evals.expected_output: A full audit report covering all 5 categories (Code Quality, Workflow Gaps, Help Modals/Docs, Security, Performance) saved to AuditReports/ with an executive summary containing severity counts, a mitigation plan, and a 'Changes Since Last Audit' section.

assertions.name: report_file_created
assertions.description: An audit report markdown file is created in AuditReports/ directory

assertions.name: executive_summary_present
assertions.description: Report contains an Executive Summary section with severity counts

assertions.name: all_categories_present
assertions.description: Report covers all 5 audit categories

assertions.name: mitigation_plan_present
assertions.description: Report contains a prioritized mitigation plan

assertions.name: severity_ratings_used
assertions.description: Findings include severity ratings

assertions.name: effort_estimates_present
assertions.description: Findings include effort estimates

evals.expected_output: A focused audit report covering only Code Quality and Security categories, saved to AuditReports/. Should be faster than a full audit and skip Performance, Workflow Gaps, and Help Modals.

assertions.name: report_file_created
assertions.description: An audit report markdown file is created

assertions.name: code_quality_present
assertions.description: Report covers Code Quality

assertions.name: security_present
assertions.description: Report covers Security

assertions.name: scope_limited
assertions.description: Report scope indicates quick/limited audit

evals.expected_output: A security-only audit report focusing on OWASP Top 10 issues, auth, authorization, XSS, CSRF, data isolation, and secrets exposure. Saved to AuditReports/.

assertions.name: report_file_created
assertions.description: An audit report markdown file is created

assertions.name: security_focus
assertions.description: Report focuses on security findings

assertions.name: owasp_coverage
assertions.description: Report references OWASP or common security concerns

assertions.name: file_paths_included
assertions.description: Security findings reference specific file paths

evals.prompt: I want to do a full audit of my app, check everything — code quality, security, performance, the works. Also check if my help docs are accurate.
evals.expected_output: The skill should trigger and run a full guided audit starting with Phase 1 (project understanding), then asking what to audit via AskUserQuestion, suggesting skills, and running parallel agents.

assertions.name: project_detection
assertions.description: Skill detects and summarizes the project stack

assertions.name: asks_audit_scope
assertions.description: Skill uses AskUserQuestion to ask what to audit

evals.expected_output: A performance-only audit report checking for waterfall requests, bundle size issues, missing caching, unnecessary re-renders, and database query efficiency. Saved to AuditReports/.

assertions.name: report_file_created
assertions.description: An audit report markdown file is created

assertions.name: performance_focus
assertions.description: Report focuses on performance findings

assertions.name: performance_patterns_checked
assertions.description: Report checks common performance issues

evals.expected_output: When a previous audit exists in AuditReports/, the new report should contain a 'Changes Since Last Audit' section comparing findings.

assertions.name: previous_audit_comparison
assertions.description: Report compares against previous audit if one exists

assertions.name: dreamforge_attribution
assertions.description: Report includes DreamForge Software attribution
